---
title: "weekly checklist"
---

## Week 1

-   [x] weekly slides
-   [x] weekly reading
-   [x] weekly lab
-   [x] weekly lab solutions
-   [x] weekly lab repo
-   [x] weekly lab invite

## Week 2

-   [x] weekly slides
-   [x] weekly reading
    -   [x] links
    -   [x] readings
    -   [x] study guide
-   [x] weekly lab
-   [x] weekly lab solutions
-   [x] weekly lab repo
-   [x] weekly lab invite
